featured.headline: Teeny Tiny Web
featured.title: Small but Mighty Dev Resources.
featured.subtitle: A little bit of everything, right in the middle.

apps.name: Teeny Tiny Web
apps.subtitle: Small but Mighty Dev Resources.
apps.description: A little bit of everything, right in the middle web tools, files, helpers etc...
apps.longDescription: Teeny Tiny Web is a compact hub built around the idea that the best developer resources don’t need to be big or complicated to be useful. With the motto “Small but Mighty Dev Resources,” the platform brings together a little bit of everything - practical web tools, helpful utilities, handy files, and simple developer helpers - all in one place. Designed to sit right in the middle of everyday workflows, Teeny Tiny Web focuses on speed, simplicity, and usefulness, giving developers quick access to the small resources that make a big difference in daily development.
features: Tools: A growing collection of free online developer tools
Projects: Real-world mini projects demonstrating essential web development concepts
Docs: Concise guides and tutorials covering development best practices
Roadmaps: Step-by-step learning paths for various developer roles
Dummy Data Generator: Generate realistic mock data for testing APIs and front-end applications
Freebies: A collection of downloadable resources such as PDFs, templates, and more.

apps.name: Check Done Hub
apps.subtitle: Small but Mighty Dev Resources.
apps.description: Check Done Hub is a minimalist to-do list app that helps you stay organized with zero fuss.
apps.longDescription: Check Done App is designed to be the simplest and most straightforward to-do list manager available. With Check Done Hub, you can effortlessly manage your tasks without any unnecessary complications. This extension provides a clean and intuitive interface, allowing you to focus solely on completing your tasks.
features: Simplicity First: No complex settings or additional information required—just a straightforward to-do list.
Easy Task Management: Quickly add, edit, and remove tasks with a user-friendly interface.
No Sign-Up Needed: Start using the app instantly without any account setup or login.
Minimalist Design: Focus on what matters most with a clutter-free, distraction-free design.

apps.name: Pro Task Timer
apps.subtitle: A task-based time tracking Chrome extension.
apps.description: Simplify task management and optimize your productivity with precise time tracking.
apps.longDescription: ProTaskTimer is a user-friendly Chrome extension designed to help you efficiently track time spent on tasks, manage your daily workload, and boost productivity. With ProTaskTimer, you can effortlessly monitor your progress and export daily task reports with a single click.
features: Task-Based Tracking: Easily start and stop task timers to track your productivity with precision.
Persistent Task List: Your tasks and timers are saved automatically, even when you close the popup or browser.
Export Daily Reports: Download your daily task summary as a CSV file for easy reporting and analysis.
Minimalist Design: Clean and intuitive interface, ensuring focus on productivity without unnecessary distractions.
Clear Task Management: Quickly clear completed tasks and start fresh with a single click.

apps.name: Passaroo - Password Generator
apps.subtitle: Simplify the process of creating strong and reliable passwords.
apps.description: easily generate complex passwords tailored to your needs and instantly copy them to your clipboard.
apps.longDescription: Passaroo is a secure and customizable password generator extension designed to simplify the process of creating strong and reliable passwords. With Passaroo, you can easily generate complex passwords tailored to your needs and instantly copy them to your clipboard.
features: Customizable Password Length: Choose the length of your password, from 6 to 50 characters.
Character Set Options: Select the inclusion of uppercase letters, numbers, and special characters to enhance password strength.
Instant Copy to Clipboard: Generate and copy your password to the clipboard with just a click.
Minimalist Design: A simple, elegant interface that allows you to focus solely on creating secure passwords without distractions.

apps.name: Vaktinde Ye
apps.subtitle: Healthy lifestyle content in Turkish
apps.description: A content platform focused on healthy lifestyle topics, providing articles, tips, and resources in Turkish.
apps.longDescription: Vaktinde Ye is a content platform dedicated to promoting a healthy lifestyle through informative articles, practical tips, and valuable resources. The platform covers a wide range of topics including nutrition, fitness, mental well-being, and overall wellness. All content is provided in Turkish, making it accessible to a broad audience in Turkey. Whether you're looking for healthy recipes, workout routines, or advice on maintaining mental health, Vaktinde Ye offers a comprehensive resource for anyone interested in improving their lifestyle.
features: Healthy eating guides and practical nutrition tips
Science-based fitness and wellness content
Daily motivation for a disciplined lifestyle
Easy-to-follow meal and habit suggestions
Actionable advice for sustainable health habits
Community-focused healthy living inspiration
Simple, practical, and realistic wellness strategies

apps.name: Movie Part X
apps.subtitle: Movie and series content in English
apps.description: A content platform focused on movies and TV series, providing summaries, trivia, and recommendations in English.
apps.longDescription: Movie Part X is a content platform dedicated to sharing engaging and informative posts about films and television series from around the world. The platform covers a wide range of content including movie summaries, character insights, behind-the-scenes facts, and curated watch recommendations. All content is presented in English, making it accessible to a global audience of movie enthusiasts. Whether you're searching for your next binge-worthy series, revisiting classic films, or discovering interesting details about your favorite actors and stories, Movie Part X offers a comprehensive resource for anyone passionate about cinema and television.
features: Concise movie and TV series summaries
Interesting trivia and behind-the-scenes facts
Then vs now and cast comparison content
Curated watchlists across genres and eras
Quick recommendations for your next watch
Actor spotlights and filmography highlights
Simple, engaging, and easy-to-consume cinema content

apps.name: Prompts.chat
apps.subtitle: Community Prompt Collection
apps.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
apps.longDescription: The largest community-driven prompt collection with over 151K GitHub stars. Originally known as Awesome ChatGPT Prompts, now evolved into a full web application. Browse, search, and contribute prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI models. Features include community contributions, prompt categories, and the ability to self-host for your organization with complete privacy. Built with Next.js and TypeScript.
features: 151K+ GitHub stars
Community-driven prompt collection
Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini
Self-hostable with full privacy
Built with Next.js and TypeScript
Open source and free
Active community contributions

apps.name: Appétit
apps.subtitle: Bon Appétit for Apps
apps.description: An Apple App Store-inspired catalog of free, tiny apps built with agentic engineering and vibecoding. Pure HTML/CSS/JS — no frameworks, no build step.
apps.longDescription: Appétit is an open-source, JSON-driven app store clone that showcases your projects in a beautiful, browsable catalog. Features a dark/light theme, sidebar navigation, featured carousel, app detail pages with screenshots, brew/npx install modals, instant search, and GitHub star counts. All content lives in a single apps.json file — edit it and deploy. Built entirely with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JS using agentic engineering and vibecoding. No frameworks, no build step, deploys anywhere as static files.
features: Apple App Store-inspired UI
JSON-driven — all content from apps.json
Dark and light theme with system preference
Featured carousel, app cards, detail pages
Brew / npx install modals with clipboard copy
Zero dependencies — pure HTML/CSS/JS
Built with agentic engineering and vibecoding

apps.name: World Vibe Web
apps.subtitle: The distributed app store, on your desktop
apps.description: A native desktop app for wvw.dev — browse, discover, and install vibe-coded open-source apps from across GitHub without opening a browser.
apps.longDescription: World Vibe Web desktop brings the full wvw.dev experience to your menu bar. Browse the community-curated catalog of open-source apps, read reviews, view screenshots, and install via Homebrew or direct download — all from a native window with macOS title bar integration. External links open in your default browser. Built with Tauri and Rust for a lightweight, fast experience. Available for macOS (Apple Silicon & Intel), Windows, and Linux.
features: Native desktop app powered by Tauri
Browse the full wvw.dev catalog
Available for macOS, Windows, and Linux
Lightweight — no Electron, built with Rust
Auto-updated from wvw.dev
